summary: Hydrated preflight shows the original representative #66597 is already closed. The surviving non-security canonical issue is #66875 for the remaining WebChat final/session.message reconciliation race. The open implementation PR #72325 is hydrated but security-sensitive due an Aisle security finding, so it is routed to central security triage and no merge, fixed-by-candidate closeout, or post-merge closeout is planned. #51497 is related but not a duplicate because it reports session transcript/token-accounting divergence rather than the UI reload/flicker race.
